query:
SELECT 
  p.cnj,
  p.status_resumido,
  p.status_original,
  p.advogado,
  p.ultima_atualizacao_api,
  p.judit_process_id,
  jr.status AS judit_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.justice')) AS justica,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.tribunal')) AS tribunal,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.subject')) AS assunto,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.value')) AS valor_causa,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.instance')) AS instancia
FROM processos p
LEFT JOIN judit_requests jr ON jr.cnj = p.cnj
WHERE p.ultima_atualizacao_api IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.ultima_atualizacao_api DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT 
  p.cnj,
  p.status_resumido,
  p.status_original,
  p.advogado,
  p.ultima_atualizacao_api,
  p.judit_process_id,
  jr.status AS judit_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.justice')) AS justica,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.tribunal')) AS tribunal,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.subject')) AS assunto,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.value')) AS valor_causa,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.raw_payload, '$.instance')) AS instancia
FROM processos p
LEFT JOIN judit_requests jr ON jr.cnj = p.cnj
WHERE p.ultima_atualizacao_api IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.ultima_atualizacao_api DESC
LIMIT 30;
